title: Accounts Manager
description:
Responsibilities:

 Oversee the full set of accounts, including Accounts Payable (AP), Accounts

Receivable (AR), General Ledger (GL), fixed assets, and month-end/year-end closing

to ensure accurate and timely financial reporting.

 Review monthly management reports, financial statements, and cash flow analysis

to support business and management decision-making.

 Prepare and manage budgets and financial forecasting.

 Manage payroll processing, ensuring full compliance with local statutory and

regulatory requirements.

 Oversee GST submissions, corporate income tax computations, and statutory tax

filings, ensuring accuracy and timely submission.

 Coordinate audits, liaising with external auditors, tax agents, banks, and the

company secretary to ensure smooth and timely completion.

 Perform other ad-hoc duties as assigned by management

Requirements

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related discipline.

  • Professional qualification (ACCA, CPA, CA) is preferred.

  • 5–10 years of relevant accounting experience, preferably in oil & gas, EPC, construction, or project-based environments.

  • Strong knowledge of accounting standards and statutory compliance.

  • Experience with accounting systems / ERP (e.g. SAP, Oracle, Dynamics, or similar).

  • Good analytical, organisational, and problem-solving skills.

  • Able to work independently and meet tight reporting deadlines.

  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

postedCompany.description:
Group Profile

OceanSTAR Elite group of companies (Headquarter in Singapore) offers One-Stop Engineering Design and extended EPCIC solutions for offshore energy sector.


Based on our strong engineering design capabilities, our services extended into CAPEX investment, procurement, construction, installation, commissioning, project management, maintenance and operation support. OceanSTAR Elite group of companies has offices strategically located in Singapore (HQ), China (Tianjin, Nantong, Qingdao, Wuhan and Shenzhen), Indonesia (Jakarta) & Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur).

Our Vision and Objective

OceanSTAR aims to become one of the leading providers of the Engineering, Procurement ,Construction, Installation and Commissioning services for Marine & Offshore Projects in the Asia-Pacific region, through our Professional Expertise and Customer-oriented approach.

OceanSTAR is keen to maximize customer satisfaction in all Safety, Technical and Scheduling aspects, in accordance with our core value: Safety, Customer Satisfaction, Synergy, Productivity and Innovation.


To become best partner for investing in Marine & Offshore assets.


More info: https://www.oceanstar.com.sg/

Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/company/oceanstar-elite/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/oceanstar-marine-offshore/
